message: I've been reading through some solid hurricane prep resources lately, and honestly, having a plan *before* storm season hits makes such a difference in how calm you feel when one's actually heading your way. The Red Cross has a straightforward guide that walks through the basics without any of the panic—it's the kind of thing I like to bookmark and actually look at when there's no weather emergency looming. What's your go-to source when you're getting ready for severe weather?
